claudeResult.resultText: Created `dashboard.html` — a standalone file with inline `<style>`/`<script>`, no external resources. It renders three KPI cards (94% pass rate, 4m 12s avg build time, 2 open incidents), an SVG bar chart of the 7-day build durations, and an SVG line chart of daily deploy counts, both built at load time via inline JS with gridlines and value labels.
